---
title: "Beryl - No tool bar / window top / border / minimize close"
date: 2007-08-01
forum: Desktop Effects &amp; Customization
---

### Post by ryanfx on 2007-08-01
As the title says, I have Beryl running but I have no tool bar on top of my menu's.  All of the effects are working fine.  I have an ATI 9800 AIW so the Nvidia work around wont work for me I believe.   Any ideas?

Thanks
-Ryan

---

### Post by Happy_Man on 2007-08-01
Well, it is saying that it is ignoring the plugins because their versions don't match. If you are running Beryl SVN, try updating the repos and upgrading, then try to run it again. If you are using the Ubuntu version of Beryl, please put this code into the terminal:

```
sudo apt-get remove -purge beryl
sudo apt-get install beryl
```

---

### Post by ryanfx on 2007-08-01
I fixed the problem, there was an update that ubuntu asked me to take, (a window decorator update) so I did it, and now I have my toolbars =D

Thanks for your help

---
